author: SantiMod
content:
Tech difficulties in the process caused the opposite of what Star Atlas stands for.

We worked hard to find a solution in the spirit of fairness & empowerment for all.

We'll provide allocation to all A-X Main Pool members who were left out today! 

We will also increase the allocation in tomorrow's Star Atlas pool for meta-poster holders. 

This allows everyone to continue being part of the historic moment in the genesis of the metaverse. 

Never forget: We are flying on the frontier together! 

 This is what happens next: 

 An allocation to the remaining 5,259  Apollo X Main Pool members will be provided at a $14 value.

 Ticket allocation in the Star Atlas Pool will be increased to $25.80 & its overflow round will be discontinued.

Power to the people! 

(https://medium.com/p/star-atlas-breaks-the-internet-4436460fd25a?source=social.tw&_referrer=twitter&_branch_match_id=861357121315606216)
